services.name: Company Formation Accounting
services.description: Accounting setup and initial tax filing support for newly formed Romanian SRLs.

services.name: PFA vs SRL Advisory
services.description: Advisory support for choosing between PFA and SRL based on activity, income, taxes and growth plans.

services.name: VAT Registration
services.description: Preparation and representation for Romanian VAT registration with ANAF.

services.name: Tax Regime Advisory
services.description: Comparison between microenterprise tax and corporate profit tax regimes in Romania.

services.name: English-Speaking Expat Accounting
services.description: Accounting and tax support in English for foreign entrepreneurs and expats operating in Romania.

services.name: Tax Compliance Monitoring
services.description: Ongoing monitoring of tax deadlines, fiscal balances and compliance obligations.

services.name: Tax Declaration Filing
services.description: Preparation and filing of Romanian tax declarations including D100, D112 and D300.

services.name: ANAF Representation
services.description: Representation and support during ANAF controls, audits and tax inspections.

services.name: Intra-EU VAT Accounting
services.description: VAT and accounting support for intra-EU operations, VIES, OSS/IOSS and cross-border invoicing.

services.name: Annual Financial Statement Review
services.description: Annual review of balance sheet, profit and loss account and Romanian accounting compliance.
